name: IT Security Evaluation and Certification Scheme
description: Japan's Common Criteria (ISO/IEC 15408) national scheme. IPA is the sole Certification Body; NITE is the Accreditation Body (JIS Q 17025); 3 commercial Evaluation Facilities (ITSC, ECSEC, TUViT) perform evaluations.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/ipa.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Published by a quasi-public body (specially-approved corporation / public-interest incorporated foundation) rather than a national government organ directly -- the Copyright Act Article 13 government-notification exclusion may not extend cleanly to this publisher. Freely readable public web content; citation/reference use is reasonable, but full redistribution status is unconfirmed. Treat as internal working data pending confirmation, consistent with the FISC entry.

current_extraction.notes: Scheme overview and main landing pages captured as clean text (HTML -> text via BeautifulSoup). No PDF scheme document was found separate from these web pages.

scope.notes: Web page content fully captured; no separate downloadable scheme document identified.
